pi_items.source: Web search confirmed standard NORAD catalog numbers for the 6 listed polar-orbiting satellites: NOAA 15 (25338), NOAA 18 (28654), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-B (38771), METOP-C (43689), SARAL (39086).
Explicitly defined in the task description as 0.7420 S (-0.7420) and confirmed via map APIs that this matches Puerto Ayora in the Galapagos.
Explicitly defined in the task description as 90.3139 W (-90.3139) and confirmed via map APIs that this matches Puerto Ayora in the Galapagos.
Explicitly defined in the task description instructions as Altitude: 10 meters.
Explicitly generated by the setup_task.sh script in the ocean_bathymetry.info file, as well as requested in the task description.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated custom map (a plain blue image) injected by setup_task.sh. The required ground station coordinates (-0.742, -90.3139, alt 10) explicitly correspond to the provided instructions for Puerto Ayora, Galapagos. The expected 6 Argos satellite NORAD catalog numbers (NOAA 15: 25338, NOAA 18: 28654, NOAA 19: 33591, METOP-B: 38771, METOP-C: 43689, SARAL: 39086) were correctly verified against official satellite databases.
